step_rationale: Ketone body; systemic metabolic stress and glucose utilization; reflects ischemic cardiac energy crisis.
mechanism: 3-Hydroxybutyrate, a ketone body, reflects myocardial ischemic switching to ketone oxidation and metabolic stress in acute coronary syndromes.

references.title: Plasma metabolomics reveals a potential panel of biomarkers for early diagnosis in acute coronary syndrome.
references.journal: Metabolomics : Official journal of the Metabolomic Society
